creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
I need to request another exp-run with all the non-obsolete patches attached, but on FreeBSD 13.

It looks that most bugs found in the precedent exp-run are FreeBSD 12-specific, which will go eol at the end of the year. So please run the exp-run against FreeBSD 13: I plan to ignore all FreeBSD 12-specific issues and commit the updates once FreeBSD 12 is eol.

Thanks.
